title: Smooth onboarding
body: Signing up was quick and the onboarding walkthrough was clear. Loved it!

title: KYC nightmare
body: Identity verification kept rejecting my documents for three days. Contact me at mike99@example.com if you fix it.

title: Can't withdraw
body: Tried to withdraw my balance twice and it failed with an error. Very frustrating.

title: Payments are fast
body: Payments go through instantly now, big improvement over last month.

title: Statements confusing
body: Monthly statements are hard to read and the PDF export is broken on my iPhone.
Great app overall, onboarding felt effortless.

title: Bad rating value
